buddy.greeting: Hi! I'm the MobiCova Health Buddy. Ask me a basic health question.
buddy.seeDoctor: MobiCova can connect you to a doctor.
buddy.limitReached: You've reached today's free question limit. Please come back tomorrow.
buddy.cannotVerify: I can only share information from trusted health sources, and I don't have a verified answer for that. Please speak to a clinician.
